allow: PowerShell($files = @\("src/components/FeedCard.tsx","src/components/CommentsSheet.tsx","src/screens/FeedScreen.tsx","src/screens/NotificationsScreen.tsx","src/lib/socialApi.ts","src/lib/feedApi.ts"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $lines = \(Get-Content $f | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Write-Output "$lines lines : $f" })
PowerShell($env:GIT_PAGER='cat'; "=== STATUS ==="; git --no-pager status --short | Out-String; "=== LOG ==="; git --no-pager log --oneline -30 | Out-String)
